style_authority.note: Uses the calm high-frequency operations context to preserve direct manipulation and reject spectacle or input lockout.

reference_selection.note: Applies motion quality, interaction physics, accessibility, property-cost, and runtime-validation guidance at the needed depth.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Keeps causal tracking and settling while rejecting decorative scale, transition-all, layout-property motion, and delayed response.

evidence_level.note: Labels the evidence static-source only and avoids smoothness, frame-rate, browser, touch-feel, and device claims.

verified_boundary.note: Separates explicit code defects from unverified computed geometry, event arbitration, Reduced Motion runtime, and performance.

design_moves.note: Covers pointer capture, grab offset, transform tracking, presentation-value interruption, velocity handoff, projection, boundaries, hysteresis, and reduced motion.

scope_control.note: Stays read-only, decisive, motion-specific, and within the explicit 150-line response budget.
